hero.title: Enterprise Knowledge Retrieval
hero.subtitle: Built a RAG-based internal engine for a legal conglomerate, automating 65% of discovery phase documentation analysis.

executiveSummary: A global legal firm with 5,000+ attorneys needed an AI-powered solution to accelerate document review in litigation cases. Our RAG-based engine reduced discovery time from weeks to hours.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: Attorneys spent 40% of their time on document review, manually searching through millions of pages for relevant information in each case.

items.text: Manual review of 100,000+ documents per major case.
Inconsistent results across different legal teams.
High cost of contract attorneys for document review.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.description: A secure RAG system with domain-specific fine-tuning that understands legal terminology and case context.

features.title: Legal AI Model
features.description: Fine-tuned on 2M+ legal documents for accurate retrieval.

features.title: Secure Architecture
features.description: On-prem deployment with zero data sharing with external APIs.

technicalSpotlight.title: Performance
technicalSpotlight.quote: The system found relevant precedents our attorneys missed in manual review.

testimonial.quote: Our attorneys now start with AI-curated document sets instead of blank slates. We're serving clients faster and more thoroughly.
testimonial.author: Jennifer Walsh
testimonial.title: Partner, Global Legal Conglomerate

cta.title: Transform your legal workflow with AI
cta.subtitle: Automate document review while maintaining the highest security standards.
